channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 BigPizzaV3/CodexPlusPlus (12740 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: BigPizzaV3

📝 Repository: BigPizzaV3/CodexPlusPlus

📄 Descrizione: An enhanced tool for CodexApp, striving to make Codex better to use and more comfortable 一个CodexApp的增强工具，努力让Codex变得更好用更舒服

⭐ Stelle: 12740

🍴 Forks: 800

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-06T09:32:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-04T06:31:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 AprilNEA/OpenLogi (3901 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AprilNEA

📝 Repository: AprilNEA/OpenLogi

📄 Descrizione: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.

⭐ Stelle: 3901

🍴 Forks: 70

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: dpi gpui hid hidpp local-first logitech logitech-mouse logitech-options mouse-remapping mx-master privacy rust smartshift

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-24T10:10:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-05T06:11:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 t8y2/dbx (2241 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: t8y2

📝 Repository: t8y2/dbx

📄 Descrizione: 15MB, lightweight, cross-platform database client. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse, SQL Server and more.15MB，轻量级跨平台数据库客户端。支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite、Redis、MongoDB、DuckDB、ClickHouse、SQL Server 等。

⭐ Stelle: 2241

🍴 Forks: 160

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: clickhouse database database-client database-management duckdb gui mongodb mysql postgresql redis rust sql-server sqlite tauri vue

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-29T03:00:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-28T05:59:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 deeplethe/forkd (1354 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: deeplethe

📝 Repository: deeplethe/forkd

📄 Descrizione: Fork() for AI agent microVMs. Spawn 100 children in ~100ms from a warm parent; BRANCH a live VM in ~150ms. KVM-isolated, snapshot CoW.

⭐ Stelle: 1354

🍴 Forks: 100

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents copy-on-write kvm microvm rust sandbox snapshot

item.title: 🦀 PentHertz/LUKSbox (566 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PentHertz

📝 Repository: PentHertz/LUKSbox

📄 Descrizione: Store sensitive files in the cloud, or on shared media without trusting the host. LUKSbox is a Rust-based encrypted-container tool with passphrase, FIDO2 (YubiKey, Titan, Nitrokey, Windows Hello), TPM 2.0, and hybrid post-quantum (ML-KEM-768 / 1024) keyslots. Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

⭐ Stelle: 566

🍴 Forks: 46

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: encryption file secure sensitive-data vault

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-06T21:47:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T16:59:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 aeroxy/ast-bro (186 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aeroxy

📝 Repository: aeroxy/ast-bro

📄 Descrizione: Fast, AST-based code-navigation toolkit for source files — surface the shape of a file (signatures with line numbers, no method bodies), the true public API of a package, the dependency graph between files, the call graph between symbols, and search the repo by symbol or behaviour.

⭐ Stelle: 186

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 🦀 finch-xu/cc-router (165 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: finch-xu

📝 Repository: finch-xu/cc-router

📄 Descrizione: 把零散的 Token Plan、Coding Plan、大模型 API 额度聚合成一个虚拟 Plan，一键接入 Claude Code、Claude Desktop App、OpenClaw、OpenCode 等工具 —— 省钱！省 Token！完全本地运行！ Bundle your scattered Token Plan, Coding Plan, and LLM API quotas into a single virtual Plan, and plug it into Claude Code, Claude Desktop App, OpenClaw, OpenCode, and more.

⭐ Stelle: 165

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agentic-ai anthropic cc-switch claude-code coding-plan deepseek gateway glm5 minimax openrouter qwen token-plan xiaomi-mimo

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-24T04:23:25Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T13:36:24Z
